name: Graph

unions.name: Edge
unions.comment:
An edge is a relation between two vertices. For example, one person can have
a relationship with another person - and you can use a custom `edge` type to
reveal more about the _type_ of relationship.

unions.name: Graph
unions.comment:
A graph is a large data type containing various data points that are linked
to each other.

unions.name: Vertex
unions.comment:
A Vertex is a data point within the graph. You can store various bits of
content in it.

values.name: degree
values.comment: Get the number of outgoing edges for a given vertex.
values.type: Graph.Vertex vertex -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Basics.Int

values.name: destination
values.comment: Get the destination that an edge points to.
values.type: Graph.Edge vertex edge -> Graph.Vertex vertex

values.name: e
values.comment: Get a list of all edges
values.type: Graph.Graph vertex edge -> List.List (Graph.Edge vertex edge)

values.name: eLabel
values.comment: Finds the label of an edge.
values.type: Graph.Edge vertex edge -> edge

values.name: empty
values.comment: A new and empty graph containing no vertices.
values.type: Graph.Graph vertex edge

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Fold over the vertices in the graph from oldest to newest added vertex.
values.type: (Graph.Vertex vertex -> a -> a) -> a -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> a

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Fold over the vertices in the graph from newest to oldest added vertex.
values.type: (Graph.Vertex vertex -> a -> a) -> a -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> a

values.name: getE
values.comment: Get an edge between two vertices, if it exists.
values.type: { from : Graph.Vertex vertex, to : Graph.Vertex vertex } -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Maybe.Maybe (Graph.Edge vertex edge)

values.name: insertE
values.comment:
Insert a new edge into the graph. If the edge already exists, it is
overwritten.
values.type: { content : edge, from : Graph.Vertex vertex, to : Graph.Vertex vertex } -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Graph.Graph vertex edge

values.name: insertV
values.comment: Insert a new vertex into the graph.
values.type: vertex -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> ( Graph.Vertex vertex, Graph.Graph vertex edge )

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Checks whether a graph is empty.
values.type: Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Basics.Bool

values.name: mapE
values.comment:
Map all edge labels to a new value. Note that this function is completely
blind to the location of each edge.
values.type: (edge1 -> edge2) -> Graph.Graph vertex edge1 -> Graph.Graph vertex edge2

values.name: mapV
values.comment:
Map all vertex labels to a new value. This function cannot change the
structure of the graph, but it can use the structure of the graph to remap the
labels.
values.type: (Graph.Vertex vertex1 -> vertex2) -> Graph.Graph vertex1 edge -> Graph.Graph vertex2 edge

values.name: origin
values.comment: Get the vertex that an edge starts from.
values.type: Graph.Edge vertex edge -> Graph.Vertex vertex

values.name: pointsTo
values.comment: Get all the edges that start from a given vertex.
values.type: Graph.Vertex vertex -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> List.List ( edge, Graph.Vertex vertex )

values.name: removeE
values.comment: Remove an edge from the graph.
values.type: { from : Graph.Vertex vertex, to : Graph.Vertex vertex } -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Graph.Graph vertex edge

values.name: removeV
values.comment: Remove a vertex from the graph.
values.type: Graph.Vertex vertex -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Graph.Graph vertex edge

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a graph with a single vertex in it.
values.type: vertex -> ( Graph.Vertex vertex, Graph.Graph vertex edge )

values.name: sizeE
values.comment: Determines the number of edges in a graph.
values.type: Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Basics.Int

values.name: sizeV
values.comment: Determines the number of vertices in a graph.
values.type: Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Basics.Int

values.name: updateE
values.comment: Check whether an edge already exists, and update it according to your needs.
values.type: { from : Graph.Vertex vertex, to : Graph.Vertex vertex } -> (Maybe.Maybe edge -> Maybe.Maybe edge) -> Graph.Graph vertex edge -> Graph.Graph vertex edge

values.name: v
values.comment: Get a list of all vertices.
values.type: Graph.Graph vertex edge -> List.List (Graph.Vertex vertex)

values.name: vLabel
values.comment: Finds the label of a vertex.
values.type: Graph.Vertex vertex -> vertex
